# Juan Miguel Cerda Ordaz (Mick Ordaz)

> Game Development Engineer, Software Engineer & Technical Lead. Creator of Heaven Crawler, Grand Prize winner at the Supernova Devs Challenge 2025, showcased at Gamescom. 7+ years building games and software in Unity, C++, and modern full-stack/AI systems.

## About

Juan Miguel Cerda Ordaz (Mick Ordaz) is a Game Development Engineer and Software Engineer based in Mexico. He is the founder of Critical Slash (independent game studio) and Lead Programmer & Co-Director at Carbon Machina Studio. He has shipped games and software on iOS, Android, PC (Steam), Apple Vision Pro, and the web. His background spans Unity game development, C++ engine programming, full-stack web development, and production multi-agent AI systems (LangGraph, Claude API, agent swarms) for biomedical and cancer research.

Portfolio: https://mickordaz.github.io/Portfolio/

## Key Achievements

- Grand Prize, Supernova Devs Challenge 2025 (unanimous jury) — Heaven Crawler ($500,000 MXN prize)
- Official showcase at Gamescom 2025 and Latin American Game Showcase — Heaven Crawler
- Most Anticipated Game Nominee, Game Effect Awards 2025 — Heaven Crawler
- Official Indie Showcase, Mexican Entertainment System 2025-2026 — Heaven Crawler
- Featured Developer at Nvidia GTC 2021 — Vivarium Engine
- Technical Speaker at Jalisco Talent Land 2023

## Games

- Heaven Crawler: Action-adventure roguelite dungeon crawler built in Unity over 6 years. Grand Prize 2025. Behavior-tree enemy AI, multi-phase colossal bosses, procedural generation, full-body IK, reactive elemental combat. Active Steam demo.
- Chrimp Desktop Pet: Desktop companion game using Win32 API for a transparent, always-on-top, click-through overlay. Full IK rig, five AI-driven minigames. Coming to Steam.
- Mecha K.O.: Narrative-driven real-time 3D boxing game with structural destruction, cel/toon shading, procedural animation, and branching dialogue. Arms physically break apart — destruction is the health system.
- Ramen Abyss: Local co-op roguelike with wobbly physics and procedural animation built in Unity 6.
- American Trail: Narrative game-jam adventure about climate migration (Unity).
- Skate & Slash: Skateboard hack-and-slash prototype built in under 20 hours (Unity).
- Slug Slayer: Rain World-inspired physics prototype with Boids AI, built in 1 day (Unity).
- Cyberdogz: Online 3D multiplayer space shooter built with Photon Networking (Unity).
- SOLBAG: Location-based Web AR crypto-airdrop hunt built with Niantic 8th Wall (WebXR, Solana).

## Tools, Engines & Software

- Biogame AI: Production SaaS multi-agent LLM platform for biomedical research with an isometric 3D lab. Lab Director AI orchestrates specialized sub-agents across 8+ live biomedical databases. Live at biogame.ai.
- Doppelbio: Multi-agent AI research automation platform. Real-time WebSocket agent collaboration, high-fidelity 3D cell/molecular biosimulations, and knowledge-graph pipelines for drug discovery.
- Minicule: Biomedical research platform with AI-powered interactive knowledge graphs and dendrograms. Live at minicule.com.
- Docs Slayer: AI documentation engine for game studios — connects to GitHub, deep-scans source code with Gemini, and generates living docs. Live in closed beta.
- Vivarium Engine: Custom C++ 3D engine with deferred PBR rendering, PhysX, VR, NavMesh baking, and live Nvidia Omniverse multi-client sync. Featured at Nvidia GTC 2021.
- Exact Agent: Enterprise no-code AI agent platform; built a real-time 3D AI news presenter with lip-sync.
- Mental Chat AI: Unity conversational AI companion for iOS, Android, and Apple Vision Pro with real-time 3D avatars, facial animation, and lip-sync.
- Propermax: Real estate platform with interactive 3D maps, AI valuations, and an AI agent controller. Live at propermax.com.
- Bowhead Health: Precision-medicine web portal with a custom scroll-driven 3D animation system. Live at bowheadhealth.com.

## Skills

Unity, C#, C++, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Three.js, FastAPI, Node.js, LangGraph, Claude API, Gemini AI, Neo4j, ChromaDB, Firebase, Docker, iOS, Android, visionOS, WebXR, Agile/Scrum, Behavior Trees, Procedural Generation, Procedural Animation, Inverse Kinematics, Multiplayer/Networking, OpenGL, DirectX, Nvidia Omniverse, Multi-Agent AI Systems, RAG Pipelines

## Experience

- Founder, Developer & Tech Lead — Critical Slash (2019-2026)
- Lead Programmer & Co-Director — Carbon Machina Studio (2021-2026)
- Professor of Video Game Prototyping — Universidad de Artes Digitales (2022-2023)
- Software Engineer, AI/Full-Stack & Medical Systems — Bowhead Health & Good Place Games OÜ (2022-2026)
